prompt.customInstructions: Adapter against the official eBay Browse API. Auth: OAuth 2.0 client_credentials. The worker configures ctx.credentials from admin → Sites → eBay API → Credentials: `login` = OAuth App ID (Client ID), `password` = OAuth Cert ID (Client Secret), `apiKey` (optional) = pre-issued Bearer token that short-circuits the token exchange. Search endpoint: GET https://api.ebay.com/buy/browse/v1/item_summary/search?q=<query>&limit=<N> with Authorization: Bearer <token> and X-EBAY-C-MARKETPLACE-ID: EBAY_US. Token cached in-module for ~2h (expires_in from the OAuth response) and refreshed 60 s before expiry. On 401/403 from /item_summary/search the adapter evicts the cache entry and throws AuthRequiredError so the runtime retries with a fresh token.
prompt.knownIssues: Default sandbox App IDs target https://api.sandbox.ebay.com/ — we hardcode the prod host here, so sandbox keys will 401. Use production keys from developer.ebay.com → My Account → Keysets. eBay Developer defaults to 5000 calls/day per App ID; raise via the Application Growth Check request. Some listings (auctions with no Buy-It-Now price) have price.value absent; we record price=0 rather than dropping the item — the searchAnalytics dashboard can filter those out if needed. Marketplace is fixed to EBAY_US; for non-US operators fork the adapter to read the marketplace header from ctx (out of scope for the PartSearchAdapter contract).
prompt.apiNotes: Full endpoint reference: https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/buy/browse/resources/item_summary/methods/search. OAuth: https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/static/oauth-client-credentials-grant.html. Scope used: https://api.ebay.com/oauth/api_scope (no user consent needed). Response schema: ItemSummary (see code for the subset we map). `total` echoes total matches so the admin UI can show pagination context even when we only pull the first page.
